title: Sor-Sull II
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Sor-Sull II''''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that carried some of Sullustan delegation to a [[Diplomatic Summit at Sullust|diplomatic meeting]] between the Sullustans and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]]. The meeting was interrupted by the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']]. [[Hamo Blastwell]] and [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], flying [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]], held off the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] until the meeting was concluded and all ships fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
